title: Marko — Content OS
subtitle: All-in-one social media command center for creators and agencies, with AI-powered workflow optimization.
about:
What is Marko?

Digital creators and agencies lose hours every week jumping between TikTok drafts, Instagram notes, Google Docs, Notion boards, and native analytics dashboards — each platform siloed from the rest. Marko acts as a single command center, unifying the entire lifecycle of a post: from raw idea and scripting, to scheduling and cross-platform publishing, to final performance analytics. It is the content operating system built for creators who are serious about scaling.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Fragmented workflows killing creative momentum
challenge.description: Professional content creators and agencies manage TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Facebook simultaneously. Without a centralized system, content ideas get lost, publishing schedules drift, and performance data lives across six different native dashboards — making it impossible to see the full picture or iterate fast.

cards.title: Scattered Content Pipelines
cards.description: Scripts lived in Google Docs, ideas in Notion, drafts in native apps, and analytics in each platform's own dashboard — zero single source of truth.

cards.title: Zero Cross-Platform Visibility
cards.description: Creators had no unified view of their publishing schedule or audience growth across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube at once.

cards.title: Blank Page Paralysis
cards.description: Without a system to capture and resurface saved inspiration, creators burned time staring at a blank page instead of producing content.

solution.title: Our Solution: A Unified Content Command Center
solution.description: Marko centralizes every stage of the content workflow into a single high-fidelity web application — from saving a piece of inspiration in the Vault, to drafting a script, composing a post with a live mobile preview, scheduling it on the visual calendar, and analyzing its performance in a unified analytics dashboard.

features.title: Visual Content Calendar
features.description: A bird's-eye editorial calendar to plan, organize, and schedule posts across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Facebook from a single view.

features.title: Inspiration Vault
features.description: A personal media database where creators save videos, images, and references. Marko AI ingests this vault to proactively suggest future content ideas aligned with the creator's unique style.

features.title: High-Fidelity Composer
features.description: A multi-pane post editor with real-time mobile previews, ensuring content looks pixel-perfect across each platform's format before going live.

techStack.title: Our Tech Stack: Modern Edge-First Web
techStack.description: Built for speed, real-time collaboration, and a premium feel — every architectural decision in Marko prioritizes developer velocity and a consumer-grade end-user experience.

categories.name: Frontend
categories.description: Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for a performant, type-safe UI with native-app-level responsiveness. Framer Motion (motion/react) drives all micro-interactions and page transitions.

categories.name: Backend & Auth
categories.description: Supabase powers Row Level Security auth, a Postgres database, real-time subscriptions for live updates, and bucket storage for media assets — all managed through a single edge-ready SDK.

categories.name: AI Layer
categories.description: Marko AI acts as an embedded creative partner, analyzing saved Vault references and engagement history to recommend optimal posting times, content structures, and daily ideation prompts.

results.title: Full Lifecycle in One Tab
results.description: Replaced 6+ fragmented tools (Notion, Google Docs, native analytics, scheduling apps) with a single unified platform covering ideation, scripting, composing, scheduling, and analytics.

results.title: Unified Cross-Platform Analytics
results.description: Creators can track reach, engagement rate, follower growth, and top-performing posts across all connected platforms in a single high-fidelity dashboard with platform-specific filtering.

results.title: AI-Driven Content Cadence
results.description: Marko AI surfaces daily content recommendations based on Vault history and audience behavior, eliminating blank-page paralysis and keeping publishing schedules consistent.
